stemHtml: Due to an explosive decompression, an aircraft initiate a rapid descent to 15 000 feet and will be cleared for a further descent to 11 000 ft in 15 minutes time. Which of the following is true with regards to the crew's use of supplementary oxygen?

options.b: Supplementary oxygen is required after 15 minutes.
options.c: There is no need for supplementary oxygen since the aircraft is no longer in a rapid descent.
options.d: There is no need for supplementary oxygen since the aircraft is at or below 15 000 ft.
